title: lespedeza striata var. stipulacea
intro: Lespedeza striata var. stipulacea, also known as the Purple Bush Clover, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family. Native to China, this plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The Purple Bush Clover has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing blood sugar levels, lowering cholesterol, and possessing anti-cancer properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin problems.
